title: phlox stansburyi subsp. superba
intro: Phlox stansburyi subsp. superba, also known as the Stansbury phlox or Utah phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Phlox stansburyi subsp. superba may include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and optimal usage.
